mapper.select: select id, ip_address as ipAddress, access_count as accessCount, last_access_time as lastAccessTime, traffic_size as trafficSize, status, country, city, isp, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime from ip_monitor where ip_address = #{ipAddress}

select id, ip_address as ipAddress, access_count as accessCount, last_access_time as lastAccessTime, traffic_size as trafficSize, status, country, city, isp, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime from ip_monitor where status in (1, 2) order by last_access_time desc

select id, ip_address as ipAddress, access_count as accessCount, last_access_time as lastAccessTime, traffic_size as trafficSize, status, country, city, isp, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime from ip_monitor order by last_access_time desc limit #{limit}
select status, count(1) as count from ip_monitor group by status order by status
select coalesce(sum(traffic_size), 0) from ip_monitor where date(last_access_time) = curdate()
select coalesce(sum(traffic_size), 0) from ip_monitor where date(last_access_time) = date_sub(curdate(), interval 1 day)

select hour(last_access_time) as hour, coalesce(sum(traffic_size), 0) as traffic from ip_monitor where last_access_time >= date_sub(now(), interval 24 hour) group by hour(last_access_time) order by hour

select case when ip_address like '192.168.%' then '192.168.0.0/16' when ip_address like '10.%' then '10.0.0.0/8' when ip_address like '172.16.%' then '172.16.0.0/12' else '其他' end as segment, coalesce(sum(traffic_size), 0) as traffic from ip_monitor group by case when ip_address like '192.168.%' then '192.168.0.0/16' when ip_address like '10.%' then '10.0.0.0/8' when ip_address like '172.16.%' then '172.16.0.0/12' else '其他' end order by traffic desc
